titleStmt.title: SII 15.99: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 99. (B.K. No. 107 of 1929-30.) MUTTAGI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab near the Rudragaṇṭi Rāmaliṅga temple.
This is dated the 3rd regnal year of the king, Bahudhānya, Pushya śu. Puṇṇami, Monday, corresponding to 1159 A.D., January 5.

It records a gift of land to the god Tikēśvara of Muttage, mentioned in No. 37 above, in continuation of which this record is engraved on the same slab, by Nāgayya, nephew (younger brother's son) of Yōgīśvaradēva. Bīchayya who held the garden land of the god on lease was to supply to the god, garlands and flowers every day as well as the yield of one tamarind tree every year and one gadyāṇa on the Dīpāvali day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Alliṁ baḷikka kaḷacuryya bhujabaḷacakravartti bijjaṇadēvavarṣada 3 neya bahudhā
nya saṁvatsarada pusya sudha puṇnami sōmavāradaṁdu hiriya guru yōgīśva
radēvara taṁmmana maga nāgaiyyaṁgaḷu mādhavarājana mānyadoḷage taṁ
nnānuchayadoḷage taṁnna dhāreya Aydu mattaru śrīrāmeśvaradēvara māṁ
nyada Aydu mattariṁ pattire baḍagalu AsuvoḷeIṁ pattire teṁka
lu 5 mattarkeyya sarvvanamasyavāgi nāgaiyaṁgaḷu dhārāpūrvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru [.]
Ī dēvara tōṁṭada Araṇiguttiga bīcaṇanu tanna makkaḷudappade dēvargge di
vasavaḷavikkuva hūvina sara 12 Oppiḍiyeraḷu sēveya bāḍu
byaṁjanakke varṣaṁprati phalavāda huṇiseya maranoṁdaṟa haṁṇnaṁ kuḍuvanu varṣaṁ
prati dīpāḷige dēvarggikuva gadyāṇa 1 Iṁtinitumaṁ naḍasi tōṁṭava vimaḷamaraṁ
māḍi Illiya brāhmaṇarōpādiya maneyanu dēvaru parvvadūṭamu
manendiguṁ stiraśāsanamāgi hokuṁbanu dēvaru sarvvābādhe parihāraṁ kādū
ḍuvaru .
Digital edition of SII 15.99 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
